zh.lifeSummary: 當Alice de Bois於1309年出生在英國英格蘭諾廷加姆爾時，她的父親Robert de Bois41歲，母親Christian Latimer40歲。她於1333年與John de Babington III在英國英格蘭諾廷加姆爾結婚。他們至少是5個兒子和1個女兒的父母。她去世於1409年在她的家鄉享年100歲。

nameMeanings.name: Bois
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Alcide, Antoine, Donat, Marcel, Ovide, Ovila, Raoul, Serge.

French: topographic name for someone living or working in a wood, from (Old) French bois ‘wood’ (from Late Latin boscum ‘bush, shrub, undergrowth’, of ancient Germanic origin), or a habitational name from (Le) Bois, the name of several places in various parts of France. This surname is also found in Haiti. Compare Debois and the most frequent French form Dubois . Compare also Boie , Boies , and Boyce .
English: variant of   Boyce   and   Boyes  .

variants.name: Dubois
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Andre, Armand, Normand, Jacques, Pierre, Fernand, Marcel, Emile, Lucien, Michel, Alain, Luc.

French, Walloon, and English (of French Huguenot origin): topographic name, with fused preposition and definite article du ‘from the’, for someone living or working in a wood (see Bois ), or a habitational name for someone from any of several places in various parts of France and in Belgium (Wallonia) named Le Bois. This is the most frequent surname in Wallonia. It is also found in the Flemish part of Belgium, the Netherlands, Germany, and Haiti. In both England and North America it is sometimes translated into English as Wood . Compare Deboe , Debois , Deboy , Duboise , and Dubose .

History: This surname is listed (in the form Du Bois) in the (US) National Huguenot Society's register of qualified Huguenot ancestors and also in the similar register of the Huguenot Society of America. One of the several Huguenot ancestors bearing this name was Chrétien Du Bois from Flanders, whose son, Louis Du Bois (born 1626 in Lille, France, died 1696 in Kingston, NY), was among the Huguenots who founded the town of New Paltz, NY 1675–78.

variants.name: Boisvert
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Marcel, Armand, Andre, Donat, Lucien, Jacques, Gaston, Normand, Pierre, Gilles, Herve, Adrien.
topographic name for someone who lived in a dense forest or perhaps a copse of evergreens, from Old French bois ‘wood’ (see Bois ) + vert, verd ‘green’.

variants.name: Boisclair
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Normand, Marcel, Aldege, Alphonse, Arsene, Edmour, Emile, Leopaul, Prudent, Rejean, Remi, Yves.

French: topographic name from Old French bois ‘wood’ (see Bois ) + clair ‘clear, light’, or a habitational name from (Le) Bois Clair, the name of several places in various parts of France. This surname is virtually non-existing in France.

variants.name: Baskerville
meanings: English (of Norman origin): habitational name from Boscherville in Eure, France, named with Old Anglo-Norman French boschet ‘copse, thicket’ (a diminutive of Bois ) + ville ‘settlement, town’.

variants.name: Debois
meanings: Altered form of French   Dubois  , a cognate of 1 above.
French: topographic name, with fused preposition de ‘from’, for someone living or working in a wood (see Bois ).

nameMeanings.name: Alice
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Originally a variant of Adelaide , representing an Old French spelling of a reduced form of Germanic Adalheidis. Alice and Adelaide were already regarded as distinct names in English during the medieval period. Alice enjoyed a surge of popularity in the 19th century and periods of favour ever since. It was the name of the central character of Lewis Carroll's Alice's Adventures in Wonderland ( 1865 ) and Through the Looking Glass ( 1872 ), who was based on his child friend Alice Liddell , daughter of the Dean of Christ Church, Oxford.

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

en.lifeSummary: When Alice de Bois was born in 1309, in Nottinghamshire, England, United Kingdom, her father, Robert de Bois, was 41 and her mother, Christian Latimer, was 40. She married John de Babington III in 1333, in Nottinghamshire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 5 sons and 1 daughter. She died in 1409, in her hometown, at the age of 100.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Alice de Bois est née en 1309, à Nottinghamshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Robert de Bois, avait 41 ans et sa mère, Christian Latimer, avait 40 ans. Elle a épousé John de Babington III en 1333, à Nottinghamshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 5 fils et 1 fille. Elle est décédée en 1409, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 100 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Alice de Bois 1309 in Nottinghamshire, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Robert de Bois 41 und ihre Mutter Christian Latimer 40. Sie hat 1333 in Nottinghamshire, England, United Kingdom John de Babington III geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 5 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Sie starb 1409 im Alter von 100 Jahren in ihrem Geburtsort.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Alice de Bois è nata il nel 1309 nel Nottinghamshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, sua padre, Robert de Bois, aveva 41 anni e sua madre, Christian Latimer, aveva 40 anni. Lei sposato John de Babington III nel 1333, nel Nottinghamshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 5 figli e 1 figlia. Morì nel 1409, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 100 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Alice de Boisが1309年にイギリスイギリスノッティンガムシュアイアで生まれた時，父Robert de Boisは41歳，母Christian Latimerは40歳であった。1333年にイギリスイギリスノッティンガムシュアイアでJohn de Babington IIIと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも5人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼女は1409年に故郷で100歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Alice de Bois(이)가 1309년 영국 잉글랜드 노틴그함실르에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Robert de Bois(은)는 41세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Christian Latimer(은)는 40세였다. 그녀는 1333년 영국 잉글랜드 노틴그함실르에서 John de Babington III(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 다섯 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1409년 그녀의 고향에서 100세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Alice de Bois nasceu em 1309, em Nottinghamshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, Robert de Bois, tinha 41 anos e sua mãe, Christian Latimer, tinha 40 anos. Ela casou-se com John de Babington III em 1333, em Nottinghamshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 5 filhos e 1 filha. Ela faleceu em 1409, em sua cidade natal, com 100 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Alice de Bois родилась в 1309 г. в местности ноттингхамшир, Англия, Великобритания, её отцу по имени Robert de Bois было 41 год, а матери, которую звали Christian Latimer, 40. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени John de Babington III в 1333 г. в местности ноттингхамшир, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 5 сыновей и 1 дочь. Она умерла в 1409 г. в её родном городе в возрасте 100 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Alice de Bois nació en 1309, en Nottinghamshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, su papá, Robert de Bois, tenía 41 años y su mamá, Christian Latimer, tenía 40 años. Se casó con John de Babington III en 1333, en Nottinghamshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 5 hijos y 1 hija. Murió en 1409, en su pueblo, a la edad de 100 años.
